Common_Product_Names: Clorox; Lysol; generic bleach; liquid bleach products
Handling_Notes: Never mix with ammonia; never mix with acids; never mix with organic solvents

Common_Product_Names: Windex; glass cleaners; some bathroom cleaners; industrial cleaners
Handling_Notes: Do not mix with bleach; can form lethal chloramine gas

Common_Product_Names: Hydrogen peroxide disinfectant; wound cleaner; whitening products; some sterilizers
Primary_Hazard: Oxidizing agent; potentially explosive with organics
Handling_Notes: Do not mix with acetone; volatile oxidizer

Common_Product_Names: Vinegar; white vinegar; some window cleaners; descaling products
Handling_Notes: Do not mix with bleach; can form lethal chlorine gas

Common_Product_Names: Toilet bowl cleaner; muriatic acid; some pool cleaners; drain cleaners
Handling_Notes: Do not mix with bleach; extremely corrosive; produces lethal chlorine gas

Common_Product_Names: Rubbing alcohol; isopropyl alcohol; some disinfectants; hand sanitizer
Handling_Notes: Do not mix with bleach; forms chloroform

Common_Product_Names: Hand sanitizers; some disinfectants; some cleaning products; alcohol-based products
Handling_Notes: Do not mix with bleach; forms chloroform

Common_Product_Names: Toilet bowl cleaners; rust removers; some descaling agents; some all-purpose cleaners
Handling_Notes: Do not mix with bleach; can form chlorine gas

Common_Product_Names: Drain cleaner; oven cleaner; lye; caustic soda; some degreasers
Primary_Hazard: Strong base; extreme heat hazard; caustic burn
Handling_Notes: Highly exothermic with water; do not mix with aluminum; do not mix with other chemicals

Common_Product_Names: Some oven cleaners; some drain cleaners; caustic potash
Primary_Hazard: Strong base; extreme heat hazard; caustic burn
Handling_Notes: Similar hazards to sodium hydroxide

Common_Product_Names: Some drain cleaners (Liquid Lightning); battery acid; some pool chemicals
Primary_Hazard: Strong acid; extreme heat hazard; toxic fume precursor
Handling_Notes: EXTREMELY exothermic; never add water to concentrated; do not mix with other chemicals

Common_Product_Names: Pool shock; pool chlorine granules; some disinfectants; swimming pool sanitizer
Primary_Hazard: Oxidizing agent; fire hazard; chlorine gas precursor
Handling_Notes: Do not mix with other pool chemicals; emits chlorine vapors in dry form

Common_Product_Names: Pool chlorine tablets; pool sticks; chlorine tablets; pool sanitizer tablets
Primary_Hazard: Oxidizing agent; incompatible chlorine source; fire hazard
Handling_Notes: Do NOT mix with calcium hypochlorite; incompatible with inorganic chlorines

Common_Product_Names: Nail polish remover; paint thinner; some solvents; fingernail polish remover
Handling_Notes: Do not mix with hydrogen peroxide; can form acetone peroxide explosive

Common_Product_Names: Paint thinner; solvent; lacquer thinner; some industrial cleaners
Handling_Notes: Do not mix with bleach; volatile

Common_Product_Names: Aluminum foil; aluminum cookware; aluminum fixtures; aluminum in pipes
Primary_Hazard: Reactive with bases and some acids; hydrogen gas precursor
Handling_Notes: Do not use in contact with sodium/potassium hydroxide drains

Common_Product_Names: Some paint removers; some degreasers; old formulation oven cleaners
Handling_Notes: Do not mix with bases; avoid mixing with oxidizers

Common_Product_Names: TATP; formed from mixing H2O2 and acetone
Handling_Notes: NEVER form; extremely sensitive to friction; shock; heat

Common_Product_Names: Disinfectant products; some sterilizers; not typically household
Handling_Notes: Do not concentrate solutions

Common_Product_Names: Produced from mixing bleach and ammonia
Handling_Notes: Produced accidentally; no safe concentration for exposure

Common_Product_Names: Produced from mixing bleach with acids
Handling_Notes: Produced accidentally; was chemical weapon in WWI

Common_Product_Names: Produced from mixing bleach with alcohols
Handling_Notes: Produced accidentally; can cause unconsciousness and death

Common_Product_Names: Produced from sodium/potassium hydroxide + aluminum
Primary_Hazard: EXPLOSIVE - forms explosive mixture with air
Handling_Notes: Produced accidentally from drain cleaners; explosive range 4-75% in air
